description: Multi-context Twitter-style social application: users + sessions, tweets + content limits, follow graph + timeline retrieval. Demonstrates rich domain semantics (timeline_includes_self, follow_asymmetric) and data classification.
acceptance_criteria: Given a username 'alice' and password 'pw1234567', When sign_up is called, Then result is a User
Given an existing user 'alice' with password 'pw1234567', When login is called, Then result is a Session
Given a user 'alice' with content 'hello world', When post_tweet is called, Then result is a Tweet
Given content longer than 280 characters, When post_tweet is called, Then an error is raised
Given user 'alice' follows 'bob' and bob has 1 tweet, When get_timeline is called for alice, Then the result length is 1
Given user 'alice' has not followed anyone, When get_timeline is called for alice, Then the result includes alice's own tweets
